2603.24258.title: Semantic Alignment across Ancient Egyptian Language Stages via Normalization-Aware Multitask Learning
2603.24258.paper_summary: We study word-level semantic alignment across four historical stages of Ancient Egyptian. These stages differ in script and orthography, and parallel data are scarce. We jointly train a compact encoder-decoder model with a shared byte-level tokenizer on all four stages, combining masked language modeling (MLM), translation language modeling (TLM), sequence-to-sequence translation, and part-of-speech tagging under a task-aware loss with fixed weights and uncertainty-based scaling. To reduce surface divergence we add Latin transliteration and IPA reconstruction as auxiliary views. We integrate these views through KL-based consistency and through embedding-level fusion. We evaluate alignment quality using pairwise metrics, specifically ROC-AUC and triplet accuracy, on curated Egyptian-English and intra-Egyptian cognate datasets. Translation yields the strongest gains. IPA with KL consistency improves cross-branch alignment, while early fusion demonstrates limited efficacy. Although the overall alignment remains limited, the findings provide a reproducible baseline and practical guidance for modeling historical languages under real constraints. They also show how normalization and task design shape what counts as alignment in typologically distant settings.
2603.24258.paper_summary_zh: 我們研究古埃及語四個歷史階段的詞級語義對齊。這些階段在文字和拼寫上有所不同，並且平行數據稀缺。我們共同訓練了一個緊湊的編碼器-解碼器模型，使用共享的字節級標記器，涵蓋所有四個階段，結合了掩碼語言建模（MLM）、翻譯語言建模（TLM）、序列到序列翻譯和詞性標註，並在固定權重和基於不確定性的縮放下採用任務感知損失。為了減少表面差異，我們添加了拉丁轉寫和IPA重建作為輔助視角。我們通過基於KL的一致性和嵌入層融合來整合這些視角。我們使用成對指標評估對齊質量，具體而言是ROC-AUC和三元組準確性，針對精心策劃的埃及-英語和內部埃及同源數據集。翻譯帶來了最強的增益。具有KL一致性的IPA改善了跨分支對齊，而早期融合顯示出有限的效能。儘管整體對齊仍然有限，但這些發現提供了一個可重複的基準和在真實約束下建模歷史語言的實用指導。它們還顯示了正規化和任務設計如何塑造在類型學上遙遠的環境中什麼算作對齊。
2603.24258.author: He Huang et.al.
